Catalog/Cardiovascular/Dafodil Bioprosthetic Aortic Valve
❤️ CardiovascularREF: DDL-AOR-XXX

Dafodil Bioprosthetic Aortic Valve

Dafodil · Heart Valves

Tri-leaflet stented bioprosthesis designed for aortic valve replacement with triple-composite design providing optimal Effective Orifice Area (EOA). Features bovine pericardium tissue with proprietary anti-calcification treatment for enhanced long-term durability.

MaterialBovine pericardium with Elgiloy alloy wireform
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Tri-leaflet stented bioprosthesis designed for aortic valve replacement with triple-composite design providing optimal Effective Orifice Area (EOA). Features bovine pericardium tissue with proprietary anti-calcification treatment for enhanced long-term durability.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Dafodil Bioprosthetic Aortic Valve, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Dafodil Bioprosthetic Aortic Valve is constructed using Bovine pericardium with Elgiloy alloy wireform, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
